title: glechoma supina
intro: Glechoma supina, also known as creeping lemon balm or creeping thyme, is a type of perennial herb that belongs to the mint family (Lamiaceae). Traditionally, Glechoma supina has been used in folk medicine for its medicinal properties, which include antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and antiviral effects. The health benefits of Glechoma supina are attributed to its ability to relieve digestive issues, reduce stress and anxiety, and boost the immune system. Glechoma supina can be prepared as a herbal tea, tincture, or infused oil, and is also used in culinary applications due to its lemony flavor and aroma.
